components.symbol_description: Vessel data block / title block for Fuel Gas KO Drum. No vessel outline drawn in this tile — only the instrument/equipment data annotation.
components.notes: Full data block reads: SIZE 2200mm(I.D.)×5500mm(L), Design Pressure 14 barg/FV, Design Temp -20~100°C (NOTE-7), Op Pressure 9.0~10.4 barg, Op Temp 23~72°C, Material Carbon Steel (CS)+3mm CA (text cut off at right edge), Insulation (NO)CO2, Trim Number PP01-362-V001-TX0001-B03F9. Vessel body partially visible as arc at bottom-right corner.

components.symbol_description: Rectangular source reference box (upstream P&ID reference) with arrow pointing right, labeled 'FUEL GAS FROM DS-1 SCRAPPER RECEIVER'
components.position_hint: left edge, lower-middle height, upper inlet line
components.notes: Standard continuation box indicating this line originates from drawing N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0005-001 (DS-1 Scrapper Receiver P&ID).

components.symbol_description: Rectangular source reference box with arrow pointing right, labeled 'FUEL GAS FROM DS-3 SCRAPPER RECEIVER'
components.position_hint: left edge, lower-middle height, lower inlet line
components.notes: Continuation from drawing N-PG-PP01-PR-PID-0007-001 (DS-3 Scrapper Receiver P&ID).

components.symbol_description: Line number label placed above horizontal 16" pipe run
components.position_hint: center, lower-middle height, upper inlet run
components.notes: Annotated with 'NO POCKETS' and 'NOTE-10' below the line label. 16-inch fuel gas line from DS-1 scrapper.

components.symbol_description: Line number label placed above horizontal 16" pipe run
components.position_hint: center, lower-middle height, lower inlet run
components.notes: Annotated with 'NO POCKETS' and 'NOTE-10'. 16-inch fuel gas line from DS-3 scrapper.

components.symbol_description: Manual isolation valve (hand valve); symbol shows two opposing filled triangles (gate valve symbol) with actuator indicator; labeled '16"' upstream
connections: right-edge pipe continuing to tile r1c2
components.notes: HV = Hand Valve (manually operated). 16" line. Valve appears to be a full-bore gate or ball valve.

components.symbol_description: Manual isolation valve; same symbol as HV0094 — two opposing filled triangles with actuator; labeled '16"' upstream
connections: right-edge pipe continuing to tile r1c2
components.notes: HV = Hand Valve. 16" line from DS-3. Downstream connects toward drum inlet.

components.symbol_description: Manual isolation valve with spectacle blind / spade indicator; positioned on vertical 12" drop leg after 16"×12" reducer
components.position_hint: lower right, on vertical leg feeding nozzle N4
components.notes: Associated with '16"×12" 16"' reducer annotation. Positioned above nozzle N4 on the drum.

components.symbol_description: Manual isolation valve with spectacle blind / spade indicator; positioned on vertical 12" drop leg after second 16"×12" reducer
components.position_hint: lower right, on vertical leg feeding nozzle N5, immediately right of HV0093
components.notes: Mirror arrangement to HV0093/N4. Feeds nozzle N5 on the drum top.

components.symbol_description: Nozzle connection point on top of drum vessel; labeled 'N4' with '12"' pipe size; NOTE-2 annotation with hatched flange symbol
components.position_hint: bottom right, drum top nozzle, left of N5
components.notes: 12" inlet nozzle on KO drum. NOTE-2 referenced (likely weld neck flange or spec note). Flange shown with double hash marks.

components.symbol_description: Nozzle connection point on top of drum vessel; labeled 'N5' with '12"' pipe size; NOTE-2 annotation with hatched flange symbol
components.position_hint: bottom right, drum top nozzle, right of N4
components.notes: 12" inlet nozzle, same spec as N4. NOTE-2 referenced.

components.symbol_description: Partially visible nozzle at right edge; labeled 'N17'; size appears to be 3" (partially cut off)
components.position_hint: bottom right corner, cut off at right tile edge
components.notes: Only label visible; pipe size partially obscured. Continues into tile r1c2. Size reads approximately '3"' but not fully legible.

components.symbol_description: Concentric or eccentric reducer symbol on vertical pipe; annotated '16"×12" 16"' indicating reducing from 16" header to 12" drop leg
components.notes: The annotation '16"×12" 16"' suggests a 16" tee off the header reduced to 12" into the drum nozzle.

components.symbol_description: Concentric or eccentric reducer; annotated '16"×12" 16"' on second vertical leg
components.position_hint: lower right, above HV0095/N5 leg, right of REDUCER-N4
components.notes: Same spec as REDUCER-N4. Both reducers feed top nozzles of the KO drum.

components.symbol_description: Reference note callout appearing twice near N4 and N5 flanges
components.notes: NOTE-2 is referenced at both drum inlet nozzle flanges. Specific note text not visible in this tile — likely on drawing legend/notes sheet.

components.symbol_description: Text annotation 'NO POCKETS / NOTE-10' appearing on both 16" inlet lines
components.position_hint: center, on both horizontal pipe runs
components.notes: Pipe routing requirement — no low-point pockets permitted. Applies to both DS-1 and DS-3 inlet lines.

pipes.notes: Horizontal 16" fuel gas line from DS-1 scrapper receiver. 'NO POCKETS, NOTE-10' applies.
Horizontal 16" fuel gas line from DS-3 scrapper receiver. 'NO POCKETS, NOTE-10' applies.
16" pipe exits tile at right edge after HV0094; merges downstream toward drum inlet header.
16" pipe exits tile at right edge after HV0203; routes toward drum inlet.
Vertical drop leg from 16" header through reducer to 12" nozzle N4 on drum top.
Vertical drop leg from 16" header through reducer to 12" nozzle N5 on drum top.
Small-bore line at N17 nozzle; cut off at right tile edge. Continues into tile r1c2.

edge_components: HV0094 — downstream pipe exits right edge
HV0203 — downstream pipe exits right edge
N17 — nozzle label and pipe cut off at right edge
PP01-362-V001 vessel body — drum arc visible at bottom-right corner, full vessel in tile r1c2/r2c2
MATERIAL annotation in vessel data block — text cut off at right edge (reads 'CARBON STEEL (CS) + 3 mm CA (INTERNA...')
